question: Andaman And Nicobar Islands state mein un areas ke liye location name aur sub-district dikhaiye jinki 1991 census year mein total population 500 se zyada thi. Inhe location name aur sub-district ke hisaab se group karein aur location name ke anusaar alphabetically order mein arrange karein.

predicted_sql:
SELECT dg.location_name, dg.sub_district 
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy dg 
JOIN fact_population_core fpc ON dg.hierarchy_id = fpc.hierarchy_id 
WHERE dg.state ILIKE 'andaman and nicobar islands' AND fpc.census_year = 1991 AND fpc.total_population > 500 
GROUP BY dg.location_name, dg.sub_district 
ORDER BY dg.location_name;
raw_output:

question: Census year 1991 ke liye, har state ki list banao jisme total male working population, total female working population, aur average households ki sankhya ho, state ke hisaab se group karke.

    dg.state, 
    SUM(fws.male_working_population) AS total_male_working_population,

    fact_workforce_status fws

    dim_geography_hierarchy dg ON fws.hierarchy_id = dg.hierarchy_id
JOIN 
    fact_housing fh ON fws.hierarchy_id = fh.hierarchy_id

    fws.census_year = 1991
